Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for the San Francisco Public Administrator, Personal Representative; David Turpin, via CourtCall, for Fraser & Fraser/Trust & Estate Research LLC, Assignee.

The court confirms with Mr. Turpin that a new order has not yet been uploaded but that he will do so, soon. The court queries counsel regarding what efforts have been made with respect to possible heirs in Canada. Ms. Mannion reports that she and Mr. Turpin discussed the preceding and that someone from her office attempted to contact the Canadian authorities to search for the heirs, but they received no reply. The court believes that the parties have been diligent and that the court is inclined to grant the petition but that it will require the new order. The court instructs Mr. Turpin to forward the new order to the assigned Examiner via email.

The Petition to Determine, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obilinatto. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Turpin appeared by telephone for Trust and Estate Search, and for Fraser and Fraser.

The court noted that no other parties are present. Mr. Turpin stated that he consulted with Ms. Mannion and Mr. Accornero, and that they all agree to continue the matter to November 10th for adequate time for the Examiner to consider the supplement to the statement of interest and a second supplement that was just accepted this morning. The Petition to Determine Those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate is continued to November 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: S. Park. Not reported.
